name: Cheese and Salmon Bagel
recipeIngredient: 1 Bagel, mini (1 oz), cut in half horizontally and toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread cream cheese over one cut side of the toasted bagel.
2. Arrange capers on top of the cream cheese.
3. Add salmon slices and tomato slices.
4. Top with red onion slices.
5. Place remaining half of the toasted bagel on top to complete the sandwich.
Weight Watcher's Exchanges: 1 Protein, 1 Vegetable, 1 Bread, 35 Optional Calories
Nutritional Analysis per serving: 152 calories, 10 g protein, 4 g fat, 19 g carbohydrates, 42 mg calcium, 553 mg sodium, 14 mg cholesterol, 1 g dietary fiber (excluding capers). Calories from fat: 22.5%.
